name: AD Mixtape · Some for Bohannon (A Mixtape)
description: “Some for Bohannon,” a celebration and glance at the funky creations of Hamilton Bohannon: a drummer, song writer, and record producer who, as Ron Wynn noted, perfected a "formula of heavy, thudding bass accents and aggressive rhythms". He passed away April 24, 2020. Rest in peace.
